pages.name: Home
pages.description: Entry point for the local boat insurance provider, highlighting core actions like getting a quote, filing a claim, managing a policy, finding an agent, viewing discounts, and visiting the help center.
primary_functions: Provide primary calls to action for getting an online boat insurance quote
Link to key tasks such as filing a claim, accessing policy information, finding a local agent, viewing discounts, and visiting the help center
Summarize main boat insurance offerings and direct users to coverage details

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the main "Get a Quote" hero button
Click "File a Claim" quick link
Click "Find a Local Agent" quick link
Click "View Discounts" quick link
Click "Manage My Policy" quick link
Click "Boat Coverage Options" section link
Click "Help & FAQs" quick link

access_methods.description: Main navigation link labeled "Home"
Indirectly via other footer links back to homepage logo
Direct entry point via root URL

pages.name: Boat Insurance Coverage Overview
pages.description: Explains available boat insurance coverages and policy types (Liability Only, Standard, Premium), and provides jumping-off points to compare policies or start a tailored quote.
primary_functions: Describe core boat insurance coverages and what each policy type includes
Provide a "Coverage Options" context for users before starting a quote
Link to the policy comparison table to compare policy types side by side
Start a quote pre-filtered by a selected policy type or coverage focus

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Compare Policy Types" button/link
Click a generic "Get a Quote" button on the coverage overview page
Click a "Start Quote" button on a specific policy type card

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Boat Insurance"
Footer link labeled "Boat Coverage Options"
Linked from homepage coverage summaries

pages.name: Policy Comparison
pages.description: Side-by-side comparison of Liability Only, Standard, and Premium policy types with feature highlights and tools to focus on specific coverages like towing and uninsured boater.
primary_functions: Display a comparison table for policy types including features like on-water towing and uninsured boater coverage
Allow users to highlight or filter specific features such as towing and uninsured boater coverage
Identify which policy types meet selected feature requirements
Link to detailed information for each policy type via "View Details" buttons

incoming_params.description: Comma-separated feature codes to highlight in the comparison table (e.g., "on_water_towing,uninsured_boater_coverage").
If true, only policy types that include all highlighted features are emphasized.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "View Details" under a policy type column
Click a direct "Get a Quote" button for a policy type from the comparison table

access_methods.description: Accessed via "Compare Policy Types" link/button on coverage_overview.html
Feature highlighting controlled via URL query parameters

pages.name: Policy Type Detail
pages.description: Detailed view of a specific policy type including coverages, options, pricing guidance, and the ability to start a quote with a preferred liability limit.
primary_functions: Show detailed description and inclusions for a selected boat policy type (e.g., Standard or Premium)
Allow the user to choose or confirm a liability limit (including at least $500,000)
Explain which optional coverages and benefits are available with this policy type
Provide a "Get a Quote for This Policy" call to action to start a tailored quote

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the policy type whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Get a Quote for This Policy" button after selecting a liability limit
Click breadcrumb or "Back to Comparison" link

access_methods.description: Accessed with a policyTypeId query parameter from comparison or coverage overview
Linked from policy type cards in the coverage overview and comparison table

pages.name: Discounts Overview
pages.description: Overview of available discounts for boat insurance such as boating safety and multi-policy discounts, with the ability to start a quote with discounts in mind.
primary_functions: List available discounts (e.g., Boating Safety Course, Multi-Policy) with brief eligibility summaries
Link to detailed discount information pages for specific discounts
Provide an "Apply Discounts to a Quote" or similar button that starts a quote with discount focus
Educate users on how discounts affect their premium before or during the quote flow

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Learn More" link under a specific discount such as Boating Safety Course
Click the "Apply Discounts to a Quote" / "Start a Quote with Discounts" button

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Discounts"
Footer link labeled "Discounts"

pages.name: Discount Detail
pages.description: Detail view for a single discount such as the Boating Safety Course discount, including how to qualify and how to apply it to a quote.
primary_functions: Describe eligibility criteria, documentation, and savings potential for a specific discount
Explain how to qualify for and apply the discount within the quote process
Provide navigation back to the Discounts Overview page
Offer an entry point to start a new quote with the discount context applied

incoming_params.description: Discount code to display details for (e.g., "boating_safety_course").

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click breadcrumb or "Back to Discounts" link
Click a "Start a Quote with This Discount" button

access_methods.description: Accessed via discountCode query parameter from discounts overview

pages.name: Quote  Boat Details
pages.description: First step of the online quote process where users enter basic boat and location information. Also initializes a new quote when entered from CTAs like homepage or discounts.
primary_functions: Collect boat details such as boat type, length, value, and usage
Collect location information such as ZIP code for rating and eligibility
Validate that boat details meet online quote eligibility (length, value, etc.)
Pass the user to the coverage options step of the quote wizard

incoming_params.description: Origin of the quote (e.g., "homepage_cta", "discounts_page", "coverage_overview_page", "policy_type_detail_page", "policy_comparison_page"). Used when initializing a new quote.
Optional policy type context when starting a quote for a specific policy type.
Comma-separated discount codes to preselect for the new quote (e.g., "boating_safety_course,multi_policy").
Identifier of a previously saved quote when resuming at the boat details step.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Continue" button after valid boat and location details are entered
Click a "Cancel" or "Back to Home" link

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Get a Quote"
Primary CTA from the homepage and other entry points
Uses query parameters to capture entrySource, quoteId, policyTypeId, and discountCodes
Boat details form submission advances the quote to coverage options

pages.name: Quote  Coverage Options
pages.description: Second quote step where users select liability limits, deductibles, policy type (when applicable), and apply discount eligibility before viewing plans.
primary_functions: Allow users to select liability limits (e.g., $300,000, $500,000) and deductibles (e.g., $500)
Display and allow editing of any preselected policy type context from earlier pages
Collect discount eligibility selections (e.g., boating safety course completed, multi-policy) when applicable
Update estimated pricing based on coverage and discount selections
Provide a "View Plans" or similar action to move to the plans list step

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the active quote to load coverage options for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "View Plans" / "See Plans" button after choosing liability and deductible
Click a "Back" link to modify boat details

access_methods.description: Coverage options form submission triggers plan calculation and navigation to the plans list
quoteId passed in URL when coming from other steps or resuming a quote

pages.name: Quote  Plans List
pages.description: Displays available plan options for the chosen coverages, with pricing and sorting controls to help users choose a plan.
primary_functions: List available plans that match selected coverage options and discounts
Allow sorting (e.g., Price: Low to High) to identify the cheapest qualifying plan
Show key differences between plans at a glance (coverage levels, included features)
Provide "Select Plan" actions that lead to the plan summary and customization step

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the quote whose plans should be listed.
Current sort order for plans (e.g., "price_asc" for Price: Low to High).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Select Plan" button on a plan row
Click a "Back" link to adjust coverage options

access_methods.description: Changing sort order or selecting a plan updates state via interfaces
quoteId and sortBy provided in the query string when arriving from coverage options or resuming

pages.name: Quote  Plan Summary & Options
pages.description: Plan selection confirmation page with optional coverages, billing options, quote-saving functionality, and entry into the applicant information step.
primary_functions: Summarize the selected plans coverages, limits, deductibles, and base price
Allow customization of optional coverages (e.g., Towing & Assistance, Personal Effects limits) with real-time additional cost display
Ensure users can keep added optional coverage cost under a specified amount (e.g., $20 per month) by adjusting options
Allow selection of billing options such as monthly payments or pay annually
Provide functionality to save the quote with a custom label and show a confirmation with a reference number
Begin the applicant information step of the quote process within the same page or flow, if needed

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the quote whose selected plan summary and options should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Plans" link
After saving a quote, click a "View All Saved Quotes" or "Go to My Policy" link

access_methods.description: Adjusting optional coverages, billing frequency, or saving the quote invokes interfaces without leaving the page
quoteId passed in URL when arriving from plans list or resuming

pages.name: Account Dashboard
pages.description: Single-user account area showing existing policies and recent quote activity. Includes in-page demo login for accessing the dashboard.
primary_functions: Display a list or cards for the users existing policies including the boat policy (e.g., BP-10001)
Provide direct access to a selected policys detail view and settings
Show saved quotes and their labels and reference numbers, with links back into the quote flow
Serve as a hub to manage existing coverage and continue or review quotes

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click the "Boat Policy" card (e.g., policy number BP-10001)
Click a saved quote whose current step is "boat_details"
Click a saved quote whose current step is "coverage_options"
Click a saved quote whose current step is "plans_list"
Click a saved quote whose current step is "plan_summary"

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "My Policy"
Internal links from confirmation screens can bring the user here

pages.name: Policy Detail
pages.description: Detailed view for a specific boat policy, including contact details, mailing address management, and policy documents like the digital ID card.
primary_functions: Show policy information such as policy number, effective dates, and key coverages
Provide a "Profile & Settings" or "Contact Details" section where the mailing address can be viewed and edited
Allow editing and saving of mailing address fields (address, city, state, ZIP)
Provide an "ID Cards" or "Documents" section listing policy documents and ID cards
Allow viewing of the digital ID card within the page without requiring download or print

incoming_params.description: Policy identifier/number for which details should be displayed (e.g., "BP-10001").

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click breadcrumb or "Back to My Policies" link

access_methods.description: Accessed with a policyId query parameter from the account dashboard or related links

pages.name: Claim Start
pages.description: Initial claim entry point where users choose claim type and identify the policy before going into the multi-step claim form.
primary_functions: Present available claim types and allow the user to select "Boat Insurance"
Collect a policy number to associate the claim with a specific boat policy
Start a new claim and route the user into the multi-step claim form
Provide basic guidance on what information will be needed to complete a claim

incoming_params.description: Optional prefilled policy number when starting a claim from a specific policy context.

outgoing_connections.trigger: After selecting "Boat Insurance" and entering a valid policy number, click the "Start Claim" / "Continue" button
Click "Back to Home" link

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Claims"
Footer link labeled "File a Claim"
Claim type and policy number form submission starts the claim

pages.name: Claim Form
pages.description: Multi-step form for filing a boat insurance claim, including incident details, owner information, incident description, review, and submission.
primary_functions: Collect incident details such as date, location, cause of damage, estimated damage amount, injuries, and police report status
Collect owner contact information including name, phone number, and email
Allow entry of a free-text incident description explaining what happened and the visible damage
Provide a review step summarizing claim information before submission
Submit the completed claim and display an on-page confirmation state

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the active claim started from the claim start page.
Optional step indicator in the multi-step form (e.g., "incident_details", "owner_details", "description", "review").

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Continue" on the incident details step after successfully saving incident details
Click "Continue" on the owner details step
Click "Review Claim" after entering the free-text incident description
Click "Submit Claim" on the review step; page stays on a confirmation view

access_methods.description: Each step of the multi-step claim form submits via the respective update interfaces
Optional claimId and step parameters support deep-linking and state restoration

pages.name: Agent Search
pages.description: Search interface for finding local insurance agents based on ZIP code and distance, with sorting by proximity.
primary_functions: Allow users to search for local agents near a ZIP code (e.g., 98109)
Provide filters including distance radius (e.g., within 15 miles) and sorting by distance
Display a list of matching agents with key contact details
Link to individual agent detail pages for more information and contact options

incoming_params.description: ZIP code to search for nearby agents (e.g., "98109").
Radius in miles for the agent search (e.g., 15).
Sort order for results (e.g., "distance" for Distance: Nearest First).

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on the agent's name in the search results

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Find an Agent"
Footer link labeled "Find a Local Agent"
Submitting the search form triggers the searchAgents interface
Search criteria may be reflected in the URL for shareable search results

pages.name: Agent Detail
pages.description: Detailed page for an individual local agent, with contact information, click-to-call, and a consultation request form.
primary_functions: Display agents name, office address, phone numbers, and service area
Offer a primary call-to-action link such as "Call Office" that uses a phone link
Provide a "Request a Consultation" or "Contact Agent" form to send a message
Collect users name, email, and message about their boat insurance needs and confirm submission

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the agent whose details should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a "Back to Search Results" link

access_methods.description: Accessed via agentId query parameter from the agent search results

pages.name: Help Center / FAQs
pages.description: Central support and FAQ hub including search and navigation to help articles, including eligibility topics like maximum boat length for online quotes.
primary_functions: Provide a search bar for users to search FAQs (e.g., "maximum boat length")
Display search results that link to specific help articles
Offer categorized help topics, including eligibility, claims, billing, and general information
Serve as an access point for About and general support content via links to relevant articles

incoming_params.description: Search query string entered by the user (e.g., "maximum boat length").

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a help article title in search results or featured lists
Click the site logo or a "Back to Home" link

access_methods.description: Header link labeled "Help & FAQs"
Footer link labeled "Help & FAQs"
Help search form submission triggers searchHelpArticles
Search query may appear in the URL for direct linking to search results

pages.name: Help Article
pages.description: Template page for individual help and informational articles, including eligibility rules like maximum boat length for online quotes and company information such as About Us and legal notices.
primary_functions: Display the full content of a selected help article (e.g., boat eligibility for online quotes)
Provide specific rules such as maximum boat length allowed for online quotes
Present other informational content including About Us, Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, and Contact information depending on the article selected
Offer navigation back to the Help Center or the homepage

incoming_params.description: Help article slug identifying which article content to display (e.g., "boat_eligibility_for_online_quotes", "faq_maximum_boat_length").
Alias for slug used by footer links (e.g., "about_us", "contact_us", "privacy_policy", "terms_of_use"); treated equivalently to slug.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click "Back to Help Center" link
Click the site logo or a "Home" link
From an eligibility article, click a contextual "Start a Quote" link after reading rules (e.g., maximum boat length)

access_methods.description: Footer links for About Us, Contact Us, Privacy Policy, and Terms of Use point here with articleId query parameter
Accessed via slug or articleId query parameter from help center or footer
Linked directly from various content sections when referencing specific articles

header_links.description: Homepage and main entry to all primary tasks
Overview of boat insurance coverage options and policy types
Start an online boat insurance quote
View available discounts and start a quote with discounts applied
Search for a local insurance agent by ZIP code
Access existing policies and saved quotes (single-user dashboard)
Visit the help center and frequently asked questions

footer_links.description: Ways to contact the company for support or sales
Details on how user information is collected and used
Website and service terms and conditions
Summary of boat insurance coverage types and options
Overview of available discounts and savings
Begin filing a new insurance claim
Locate a nearby agent based on ZIP code
Access help articles and frequently asked questions
